channel.title: AI-Assisted Development on Jamie Craane personal blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Assisted Development on Jamie Craane personal blog

item.title: Bridging Human Intent and AI Code Generation with @AIGuideline
item.description: Introduction As AI-powered coding assistants become increasingly prevalent in software development, a new challenge emerges: how do we ensure that AI-generated code aligns with our project’s specific architectural patterns, design principles, and coding standards? Existing AI guidelines, for example junie/.guidelines exist for this purpose. However, they are often large and challenging to maintain. Depending on the project, they can also contain a lot of information. The larger the guidelines file, the harder for the AI to follow consistently.
